center.name: 西非
center.summary: 西非是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括白腹珍珠雞、绿冠蕉鹃、Black-throated coucal等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in West Africa in dense second growth along forest edge and grassy swamps

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |last105=Zhang |first105=Guojie |title=Whole-genome analyses resolve early branches in the tree of life of modern birds |journal=Science |pages=1320–1331 |doi=10.1126/science.1253451 |date=12 December 2014|volume=346 |issue=6215 |pmid=25504713 |pmc=4405904 |bibcode=2014Sci...346.1320J }} The species is found in the wild in the drier regions of West Africa to East Africa, as well as Sahel. It is one of the remaining six species of mousebirds

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: parvus }} thumb|Egg of Puffinus boydi(coll.MHNT) Boyd's shearwater (Puffinus boydi), also known as the Cape Verde little shearwater, is a small shearwater which breeds in the Cape Verde archipelago of the Atlantic Ocean some 570 km off the coast of West Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in West, East and southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in West Africa and south of Lake Chad

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The eastern long-tailed hornbill (Horizocerus cassini) is a species of bird in the hornbill family Bucerotidae found in humid forests of West Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: One of the smallest species among starlings, the emerald starling is distributed in West Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | date=2024 | title=Enigmas no longer: using ultraconserved elements to place several unusual hawk taxa and address the non-monophyly of the genus Accipiter (Accipitriformes: Accipitridae) | journal=Biological Journal of the Linnean Society | article-number=blae028 | doi=10.1093/biolinnean/blae028}} It is native to sub-Saharan Africa, where it has a widespread distribution with populations in southern, East and West Africa.{{Cite journal |last1=Reading |first1=Richard P

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in West Africa from Sierra Leone east to Nigeria, living in forests, forest edges, clearings and woodlands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in West and Central Africa from Sierra Leone to the Democratic Republic of the Congo

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in West Africa from Senegal and Gambia to Cameroon

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This black-and-white species is found in humid forest and second growth in Central and West Africa, ranging from Senegal east to Uganda and south to Angola

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in Iberia and North Africa, and winters in tropical West Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the African tropical rainforest (western and sparsely throughout Central Africa)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is found in Central and Western Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The vinaceous dove is a common bird that is found in central and western African countries such as Senegal, Gambia, Burkina Faso, Benin, and Nigeria. This species is abundant in scrub and savannah

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: albocristatus at Central Park Zoo, USA | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Horizocerus | species = albocristatus | authority = (Cassin, 1848) | synonyms = Buceros albocristatus (protonym) Tockus albocristatus Berenicornis albocristatus Tropicranus albocristatus }} The western long-tailed hornbill (Horizocerus albocristatus) is a species of hornbill (family Bucerotidae) found in humid forests of West Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-casqued hornbill (Ceratogymna elata), also known as the yellow-casqued wattled hornbill, is found in the rainforest of coastal regions of West Africa, for example in Côte d'Ivoire

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in West Africa, namely Sierra Leone to Ghana

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This small yellow passerine bird is found in semi-arid savanna regions of West Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Woodhouse's antpecker (Parmoptila woodhousei) is a species of passerine bird found in West Africa that is placed in the estrildid finch family, Estrildidae

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Lays four to five brown speckled eggs.}} Central America, southern South America, southern Africa, part of West Africa, Australia, New Zealand, and islands throughout the world. It has greatly extended its range in northern Eurasia since the 1850s, and continues to do so, as was shown by its colonisation around 1990 of Iceland and Rishiri Island, Japan. The extent of its range makes it the most widely distributed wild bird on the planet

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-breasted guinea fowl is distributed in subtropical West African forests of Ivory Coast, Ghana, Guinea, Liberia, and Sierra Leone

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Also known as the white-necked picathartes, this passerine is mainly found in rocky forested areas at higher altitudes in West Africa from Guinea to Ghana

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is widely spread across the African tropical rainforest primarily throughout West and Central Africa, but is also found in Southern and East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-fronted antpecker (Parmoptila rubrifrons) is a species of songbird found in Western Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Guinea turaco has an extremely large range and a stable population. It can be found in forests of West and Central Africa, ranging from Senegal east to DR Congo and south to northern Angola

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is predominantly found in West Africa, but ranging from the Gambia to Kenya

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The long-tailed hawk occurs in the tropical rainforests of western and central Africa, from Guinea in the west, along the Gulf of Guinea coast south to northern Angola, east to the southern Central African Republic, northern Democratic Republic of Congo, South Sudan and western Uganda

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The wintering areas overlap with the breeding range, but also include extensive areas in West Africa, East Africa south to Lake Malawi, and further north in Ethiopia, South Sudan and Eritrea. The large majority of birds wintering in eastern Africa are of the southwest Asian race, S
